top_signals.title: Jefferies warns of crypto market volatility as Clarity Act faces Senate test
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Record chip rally adds $2 trillion in combined value to Micron, Intel and AMD in second quarter
top_signals.summary: Wall Street poured into chipmakers not named Nvidia in the second quarter, as the artificial intelligence boom expanded to include more suppliers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, blocks Trump order
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump attended oral arguments in the case, underscoring his staunch opposition to granting automatic citizenship to many immigrants' babies.

top_signals.title: SEC seeks public comment on regulating next generation of ETFs
top_signals.summary: The request from the US agency seeks feedback on how emerging ETF structures and investment strategies should be regulated as issuers roll out increasingly specialized products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
